subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest one of Thy handmaidens who seeketh from this servant of Thine that which Thou wouldst make a healing for her through Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری امه من امائک ارادت من عبدک هذا ما تجعله شفاء لها من فضلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for healing, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
